task.name: Index Documents
task.objective: Generate or update an index.md file that references all documents in a target folder

critical.mandate: Scan ALL files in the target folder — never skip any
Preserve existing manual entries in index.md if present
Use relative paths in all links

step.title: Identify Target
step.action: Ask user which folder to index (or use current folder)
Verify the folder exists on disk

step.title: Scan Files
step.action: List all .md, .xml, .yaml, .csv files in the target folder
For each file: read the first 5 lines to extract title or purpose
Sort files by logical order: README first, then alphabetical

step.title: Check Existing Index
step.action: If index.md exists: read it and preserve any manual sections
If no index.md: create from scratch

step.title: Generate Index
step.action: Write index.md with: - Folder title (from folder name) - File count summary - Table of contents with links and descriptions - Last updated timestamp

step.title: Report
step.action: Show the generated index to the user
Report: files indexed, any files without titles

output.format: Markdown index file with linked table of contents
